assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Set_Reminders_Help_Text_Verbiage
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Set: Reminders Help Text Verbiage

assignments.name: Set_Size_of_Created_Reminders_Collection
assignments.label: Set: Size of Created Reminders Collection

decisions.name: Which_Department_is_this_related_to
decisions.label: Which Department is this related to?

Flow.description: Screen Flow to Assist Users in Cloning Event Instances. Targets only the necessary fields. 8-22-24: Addded Pino reminders

formulas.name: DST_BEGINS
formulas.expression: DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE({!Event_Start_Date_Time})),3,1) + ( 14 - CASE( MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE({!Event_Start_Date_Time})),3,1) - DATE (1900,1,7),7) , 0,7,MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE({!Event_Start_Date_Time})),3,1) - DATE (1900,1,7),7)) )

formulas.name: DST_ENDS
formulas.expression: DATE ( YEAR ( DATEVALUE({!Event_End_Date_Time})),11,1) + ( 7- CASE( MOD(DATE ( YEAR ( DATEVALUE({!Event_End_Date_Time})),11,1) - DATE (1900,1,7),7) , 0,7,MOD(DATE ( YEAR ( DATEVALUE({!Event_End_Date_Time})),11,1) - DATE (1900,1,7),7)) )

formulas.description: For Pino, allow inherit from Clone.
formulas.name: fml_LocationTitleOverride

formulas.description: If EPE, inherit the Meeting ID
formulas.name: fml_MeetingID_EPE

formulas.description: If Pino, inherit from clone or TBD.
formulas.name: fml_Parking

Flow.label: Clone Summit Event Instance

validationRule.errorMessage: The Instance Start Date must be same as or earlier than the Instance End Date
The Instance End Date must be same as or later than the Instance Start Date

fields.name: Private_Instance
fields.helpText: Hide this instance from being Published externally?

validationRule.errorMessage: Ensure the URL is less than 255 characters and that the format is a valid URL (www.website.com)
Meeting ID must be less than 100 characters
Please enter a numeric value less than or equal to 999,999.99
Please enter a numeric value less than or equal to 999,999.99
Please reduce input to 255 characters. Try to shorten the URL, and verify this is a valid URL

fields.name: SuccessScreenText
fields.fieldText:
Your Cloned Event [{!Event_Instance_Title}] was Successfully Created.


You may view it here:

https://fiucrm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/summit__Summit_Events_Instance__c/{!CreatedRecordId}/view

fields.name: RemindersText
fields.fieldText: The following Event Reminders were created:

textTemplates.name: EPERemindersBullets
textTemplates.text:
• 1 day before (24 hours prior)
  • 8:00 AM (Day of event)

textTemplates.name: RemindersVerbiage
textTemplates.text:
Create this instance with the default set of reminders for {!Instance_To_Clone.summit__Event__r.summit__Account__r.Name} events:

{!Reminders_HelpText_Bullets}
